80 - Specific Exclusions From Coverage as Home Health Services 
(Rev. 1, 10-01-03) 
A3-3125, HHA-230.A 

In addition to the general exclusions from coverage under health insurance listed in the 
Medicare Benefit Policy Manual, Chapter 16, "General Exclusions from Coverage," the 
following are also excluded from coverage as home health services:
